'''Daralla Errine''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who owned the [[CrossWind Saloon]] in [[Storrd Township]] on [[Seregar]].

She was tall woman who had a no-nonsense, business-like demeanor. She made fair deals, and would return favors. She also was known to hold grudges forever.

She made her money during a brief career as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], but decided to sink all her [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] into the CrossWind Saloon. She managed to triple her investment in a short time. Daralla liked to be informed, and kept a close eye on the underworld dealings on Seregar. This was mostly so she could be in position to take advantage of any opportunities. She made a large amount of profits from back-room deals, trades, and smuggling. She hoped to turn the CrossWind Saloon into the center of smuggling activities on Seregar.

==Appearances==
